headline: Is Verizon Communications (VZ) Below Fair Value As The BT Joint Venture Raises Fresh Questions?
summary: Verizon Communications (VZ) is back in focus after reaching an agreement with BT Group to combine their international enterprise operations into a 50:50 joint venture, a move tied to roughly $4 billion in annual revenue. See our latest analysis for Verizon Communications. Despite the BT joint venture announcement and recent spectrum wins, Verizon Communications' share price has eased, with a 30-day share price return of down 7.27% and a 90-day return of down 13.47%, while the 3-year total...

headline: A $750,000 Portfolio That Can Reliably Produce $4,000 a Month
summary: A $750,000 portfolio and a $4,000 monthly income target look like a clean equation, and they are: $48,000 divided by $750,000 equals 6.4%. The trick is that 6.4% is an awkward number. It sits above what most regulated utilities pay and below what a pure business development company portfolio might offer. Hitting it reliably means ... A $750,000 Portfolio That Can Reliably Produce $4,000 a Month
